message:
feat(ffs-repair): define repair symbol format and storage strategy (bd-16f)

Add on-disk types for RaptorQ self-healing repair metadata:
- RepairBlockHeader: 32-byte header with magic, ESI range, CRC32C
- RepairGroupDescExt: 48-byte group descriptor extension with OTI fields
- SymbolDigest: 36-byte ESI + BLAKE3 digest for decode proofs
- repair_seed(): deterministic seed derivation via BLAKE3
- RepairParseError: structured error type for parse failures
- 12 tests covering round-trips, checksums, bad magic, edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
